inputs.shares_source: 2.794 million shares outstanding at December 31, 2025 (NVR/research/evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.json; NVR 2025 Form 10-K)

valuation_methodology.decision_rule: Use one complete component schedule; preserve the range and evidence block until every material assumption is reconciled.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Every currently identified material ownership claim, liability, and option is valued once. Unknown claims remain an evidence blocker, not an unvalued line item.

valuation.evidence: NVR 2025 Form 10-K anchors via NVR/research/evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.json. Proof base 5600.0/sh via owner_earnings_reinvestment_dcf@1.0.
valuation.assumption_summary: Normalize margins, cancellations, housing starts, and working capital; capitalize cash earnings after maintenance needs, not peak GAAP earnings.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

source.locator: 2025 homebuilding pretax income $1.610 billion (NVR 2025 Form 10-K)
2025 net income $1.340 billion
Homebuilding $1.610B plus mortgage banking $152M pretax
2.794 million shares outstanding at year-end 2025 (valuation.json anchor)

assumptions.label: Effective tax rate on homebuilding earnings
assumptions.rationale: Blended filing rate from consolidated net versus homebuilding plus mortgage pretax.

assumptions.label: Through-cycle owner-earnings capitalization multiple
assumptions.rationale: Low/base/high normalize margins, cancellations, and working capital beyond peak 2025 GAAP.

valuation.evidence: NVR 2025 Form 10-K anchors via NVR/research/evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.json. Proof base 400.0/sh via owner_cash_or_dividend_discount@1.0.
valuation.assumption_summary: Separate mortgage economics from homebuilding and normalize origination volumes, gain-on-sale margins, and repurchase exposure.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

source.locator: 2025 mortgage-banking pretax income $152 million
2025 net income $1.340 billion
Homebuilding $1.610B plus mortgage banking $152M pretax
2.794 million shares outstanding at year-end 2025 (valuation.json anchor)

assumptions.label: Normalized mortgage earnings capitalization multiple
assumptions.rationale: Separate mortgage gain-on-sale and origination cycle from homebuilding owner earnings.

valuation.evidence: NVR 2025 Form 10-K anchors via NVR/research/evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.json. Proof base 350.0/sh via net_asset_value@1.0.
valuation.assumption_summary: Credit only cash demonstrably surplus to land deposits, working capital, mortgage funding, and debt.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

source.locator: Year-end cash approximately $1.916 billion in aggregate
Senior notes approximately $909 million
2.794 million shares outstanding at year-end 2025 (valuation.json anchor)

assumptions.label: Share of gross net cash that is truly distributable surplus
assumptions.rationale: Haircut for contract-land deposits, working capital, mortgage funding, and stress liquidity.

valuation.evidence: NVR 2025 Form 10-K anchors via NVR/research/evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.json. Proof base 600.0/sh via risk_adjusted_milestone_value@1.0.
valuation.assumption_summary: Value the asymmetric lot-control structure separately from current earnings, net of deposits, abandonment, and time-to-open.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

source.locator: About 169,250 finished lots under LPAs with $920.1M cash deposits
Contracts expected to yield about 38,200 additional lots
Net contract-land deposit asset $851.458 million after $110.958M allowance
2025 pre-tax deposit impairment charges $75.9 million versus $7.2 million in 2024

inputs.label: Additional deposit commitments if milestones met

source.locator: Existing LPAs could require about $733.9M of additional deposits
2.794 million shares outstanding at year-end 2025 (valuation.json anchor)

assumptions.label: Incremental controlled-lot option value beyond normalized earnings and deposit carrying value
assumptions.rationale: Values asymmetric lot-control upside net of abandonment risk; excludes double-count with homebuilding earnings.

valuation.evidence: NVR 2025 Form 10-K anchors via NVR/research/evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.json. Proof base -400.0/sh via net_asset_value@1.0.
valuation.assumption_summary: Deduct for lower volumes/margins, cancellation risk, community delays, and buybacks executed above intrinsic value.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

source.locator: 2025 backlog was 8,448 units
Cancellation rate 17% in 2025
2025 pre-tax deposit impairment charges $75.9 million
2.794 million shares outstanding at year-end 2025 (valuation.json anchor)

assumptions.label: Housing-cycle stress multiple on FY2025 deposit impairment proxy
assumptions.rationale: Bear assumes sustained margin/volume/cancellation stress and buybacks above intrinsic; bull assumes mild normalization.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of NVR, including every identified operating claim, asset, liability, and option.
economic_claim.unit_source: NVR 2025 Form 10-K: 2.794m shares outstanding, $1.340bn net income, $1.610bn homebuilding pretax income, $152m mortgage-banking pretax income, $1.916bn cash, and $909m senior notes.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and asset claims are valued once; cash, debt, financing, reserves, and other senior claims are included as separate components or within the stated equity basis.

economic_value.accounting_reference: NVR 2025 Form 10-K: 2.794m shares outstanding, $1.340bn net income, $1.610bn homebuilding pretax income, $152m mortgage-banking pretax income, $1.916bn cash, and $909m senior notes.

component_groups.label: Homebuilding owner earnings
component_groups.valuation_basis: Normalize margins, cancellations, housing starts, and working capital; capitalize cash earnings after maintenance needs, not peak GAAP earnings.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key homebuilding_owner_earnings; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Mortgage banking
component_groups.valuation_basis: Separate mortgage economics from homebuilding and normalize origination volumes, gain-on-sale margins, and repurchase exposure.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key mortgage_banking; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Net surplus cash
component_groups.valuation_basis: Credit only cash demonstrably surplus to land deposits, working capital, mortgage funding, and debt.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key net_surplus_cash; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Controlled-lot and future-community optionality
component_groups.valuation_basis: Value the asymmetric lot-control structure separately from current earnings, net of deposits, abandonment, and time-to-open.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key lot_control_and_future_communities; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is an explicit analyst judgment pending base-rate and milestone reconciliation.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Scenario range includes delay and failure outcomes.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining capital and financing are deducted in the stated option range.

component_groups.label: Housing-cycle and execution reserve
component_groups.valuation_basis: Deduct for lower volumes/margins, cancellation risk, community delays, and buybacks executed above intrinsic value.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key housing_cycle_and_execution_reserve; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

wisdom_applied: Buffett/Weschler: measure owner earnings and per-share compounding.
Marathon/Capital Returns: NVR's lot-option model changes the capital-cycle exposure.
Pabrai: preserve the asymmetric ability to abandon lots while testing housing-cycle downside.
limitations: Starter ranges are analyst estimates, not committee-approved price targets.
The model remains evidence-blocked until primary-source normalization, comparable selection, and downside cases pass independent review.

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Homebuilding owner earnings
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

items.label: Mortgage banking
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?

valuation_method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

economic_ownership_map.label: Homebuilding owner earnings

method_provenance.label: Owner earnings and reinvestment-return DCF
method_provenance.equation: cash_t = cash_(t-1)*(1+reinvestment*incremental_ROIC); value = PV(distributable cash + terminal owner earnings)

sources.locator: Owner cash, reinvestment and reverse expectations

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Homebuilding owner earnings
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Normalize margins, cancellations, housing starts, and working capital; capitalize cash earnings after maintenance needs, not peak GAAP earnings.

top_value_drivers.label: Controlled-lot and future-community optionality
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Value the asymmetric lot-control structure separately from current earnings, net of deposits, abandonment, and time-to-open.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

option_scan.question: Material options after scan?
option_scan.evidence: Operating compounder / croupier — Lawrence full cash-flow path sufficient

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
